note: The flare is centered somewhat northwest of AR 4043 (~N15E40).
Simultaneous significant brightening occurs at Active Region 14048, centered at S13E85.
Flare observed in GOES-S due to eclipse in GOES-P from 2025-03-30T03:34Z-05:40Z.
Simultaneous flaring from AR 14046 and AR 14048.

Simultaneous brightening is seen from AR 14054 (S12W70) beginning at 2025-04-11T22:18Z and ending at 2025-04-11T22:30Z, which contributes to the total brightness of this flare, but the primary contributor is AR 4055 (N08W51).
There is also simultaneous significant flaring from behind the southwest limb, likely from Active Region 14053 (S15W95).
This event is observed beyond the western limb and may be an occulted flare from former Active Region 14055, which rotated off the Earth-facing disk on 2025-04-15.
Long-duration flare associated with post-eruptive arcades from Active Region 14060 (N08W90).
Likely the former active region AR 14055.

This flare originates near the eastern limb and it is difficult to determine if the source is Active Region 14087 or an unnumbered region closer to the east limb. At the time of this event, Active Region 14087 is the closest region to this flare.
This Active Region was numbered on 2025-05-21.

This minor increase in brightening is associated with a brief post-eruptive arcade seen from Active Region 14100 and is accompanied by a long-duration post-eruptive brightening from the surrounding area near and around Active Region 14100.

This minor increase in brightening is associated with a brief post-eruptive arcade seen from Active Region 14100 and is accompanied by a long-duration post-eruptive brightening from the surrounding area near and around Active Region 14100.

This flare maintains M1.6 class for several minutes and, within that time, experiences a very slight second peak resulting from a decrease from M1.66 at peak time 2025-05-30T18:39Z to M1.63 before intensifying again to M1.69 at 2025-05-30T18:45Z. Both peaks of brightening are sourced from the same location, Active Region 14104.
Update to add newly assigned Active Region Number.
